children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is established within the Department of Health and Human Services an Administration on Children, Youth, and Families.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Administration on Children, Youth, and Families, as established under subsection (a), shall be headed by a Commissioner on Children, Youth, and Families.

children.heading: Appointment
children.label: 2 Appointment
children.text: The President, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, shall appoint the Commissioner.
